tickets.title: US002: Academic roadmap planning
tickets.description:
As a student, I want to create a multi-semester academic roadmap so that I can plan my path to graduation.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The student can add courses to future semesters.
2. The roadmap displays all planned courses by semester.
3. The system saves the roadmap after the student confirms changes.

tickets.title: US003: Schedule conflict detection
tickets.description:
As a student, I want the system to detect schedule conflicts so that I can avoid enrolling in overlapping classes.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system warns the student when two selected courses have overlapping schedules.
2. The system identifies the conflicting courses in the warning message.
3. The student can review conflicts before finalizing the roadmap.
